entries.description: Reconstruction note: Session 1's work landed in commit 1a973be ('ai_router 0.2.3: state-first lifecycle protocol') but activity-log.json was not authored during the session. This file is reconstructed from the commit message + router-metrics.jsonl to satisfy close-out gates. The work itself is on disk and was cross-provider verified (verification rounds logged below).

Added ai_router/start_session.py: CLI entry point that infers next session via compute_effective_completed_sessions, refuses to advance past an open session (exit 3), refuses to re-open closed sessions, refuses to skip ahead. Idempotent re-entry for in-flight sessions. Wraps register_session_start.

Added compute_effective_completed_sessions() to ai_router/session_state.py. Read order: completedSessions[] (authoritative) → distinct closeout_succeeded events (Full-tier fallback) → legacy currentSession-1 heuristic (last resort, stderr warning). Single source of truth for 'how many sessions closed.'

Updated _flip_state_to_closed in session_state.py to append currentSession to completedSessions[] (sorted, unique) on every close. Final-session detection now uses len(completedSessions) == totalSessions post-append, with change-log.md presence as belt-and-suspenders. register_session_start preserves completedSessions[] across snapshot rewrite (backfills from events for legacy sets).
Extended close_session --repair --apply Case 1 to backfill completedSessions[] directly from the events ledger using the new helper. Case 2 trigger narrowed for idempotency under the new semantics.

Added ai_router/tests/test_start_session.py (idempotency, refuses-N+1-while-N-open, refuses-skip-ahead, refuses-reopen-closed, currentSession inference, work_started emission/dedupe). Extended test_close_session_session4.py with completedSessions[] append assertions on every close. Extended test_repair_detects_mixed_mode_drift to assert backfill. 699 tests pass.

Cross-provider verification round 1 (gpt-5-4, $0.21): VERIFIED. Then verification round 2 (gemini-pro, $0.02): VERIFIED. Both providers concurred the state-first lifecycle protocol matches the spec invariant; completedSessions[] writer semantics correct; --repair --apply backfill path sound.
